fields.value: All three alloys attained similar hardness (~450 VHN) and strength levels after 50% cold reduction, despite different initial hardness.
fields.reason: b0073和b0093明确指出三种合金在50%冷轧后硬度相近约450 VHN，强度水平相似。

fields.value: B2 stringers in 15Mn5Ni underwent shearing and fragmentation during cold rolling, indicating load sharing by the ordered intermetallic phase.
fields.reason: b0033和b0034描述了B2 stringer的剪切、碎裂及承载。

fields.value: 15Mn5Ni alloy exhibited brittle behavior with <1% elongation when heat treated at 973 K and 1023 K, due to high volume fraction of B2 and κ-carbides along grain boundaries.
fields.reason: b0115指出15Mn5Ni在973K和1023K热处理后脆断、延伸率<1%；b0142解释原因为晶界B2和κ-carbides。

fields.value: In Ni-free LDS, processing temperature window around 973 K is critical to achieve strength-ductility balance; slight increase to 1023 K drastically reduces strength.
fields.reason: b0166明确指出Ni-free LDS的加工窗口在973K附近，升高50K至1023K导致强度显著下降。

fields.value: Dislocation-twin interaction and dynamic slip band refinement were identified as dominant strain hardening mechanisms in fully recrystallized alloys.
fields.reason: b0151和b0169指出位错-孪晶交互作用和动态滑移带细化是完全再结晶合金的主要应变硬化机制。
